summary: A clip from a Fox News segment with a station bug and on-screen clock. The graphic is titled 'MEDIA COVERAGE OF SHERIDAN GORMAN' and compares airtime across three network logos, listing '1 MINUTE 19 SECONDS', '2 MINUTES 1 SECOND' and '23 SECONDS'. A booking-style portrait of a young man is at left and a portrait of a young woman is at right, with a Media Research Center attribution at the bottom.

script.scene: A titled graphic 'MEDIA COVERAGE OF SHERIDAN GORMAN' compares network airtime figures, with two portraits flanking it.

notable_text: MEDIA COVERAGE OF SHERIDAN GORMAN; 1 MINUTE 19 SECONDS; 2 MINUTES 1 SECOND; 23 SECONDS; MEDIA RESEARCH CENTER
